_publications._publicationTitle: Graph complexity analysis identifies an ETV5 tumor-specific network in human and murine low-grade glioma.

_contextSnippet: These particular findings were confirmed by the analysis of Nf1-deficient neoplastic cells (astrocytes) by qPCR... argue that differential Etv5 expression reflects a 'whole tumor' property
details: Did not show differential Etv5 expression when analyzed in isolation, confirming that Etv5 differential expression reflects a whole tumor property rather than single cell type contribution
